blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,327 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
